spec.name: parallel_note_readers
spec.description: Spawn parallel subagents to read 6 independent research note files and return their unguessable facts for aggregation.
spec.task_template:
Read the following note files and return their exact contents verbatim. Do not summarize or alter the text — return the raw fact from each file.

Files to read:
{file_list}

Return format: For each file, output 'FILE: <filename>' followed by the full contents on the next line.
spec.aggregation_plan: Collect all subagent outputs, extract the 6 facts, and write them as a bulleted summary to <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_deepseek_v4_pro_work/subagent-04-request-only__pull__deepseek_v4_pro__t0/workspace/summary.txt

request.rationale: The objective explicitly states the 6 independent notes exceed what I can process alone within my 8-iteration budget. The CORRECT move per the objective is to delegate breadth to parallel helper agents via the harness. Three subagents each reading 2 notes in parallel will efficiently gather all facts for aggregation into summary.txt.

subagent.task: The objective explicitly states the 6 independent notes exceed what I can process alone within my 8-iteration budget. The CORRECT move per the objective is to delegate breadth to parallel helper agents via the harness. Three subagents each reading 2 notes in parallel will efficiently gather all facts for aggregation into summary.txt.
